content: Self-Refine's iterative unsupervised refinement framework can be modularly repurposed to unify scattered LLM self-reflection mechanisms by grounding multi-perspective reflection in Self-Refine's feedback loop structure. This creates a generalizable plug-and-play reflection system that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data, while enabling better reflection quality from conflicting inconsistent problem-solving perspectives.
